subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who hath turned unto Him, attained His presence and won that which was ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الله المهیمن القیوم لمن اقبل و حضر و فاز بما کان مرقوما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @law of pilgrimage, @Shrines and Holy places, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
